about.title: Who is
about.desc1: We are a team of passionate makers, engineers, and designers with a common mission: to make 3D printing accessible and high quality for everyone.
about.desc2: Born in 2024, we turned our passion into a profession, specializing in creating unique objects, functional prototypes, and collectible miniatures. We use only premium materials and the best technologies available on the market.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how we collect, use, and share your personal data when you visit or make a purchase on Dream3D.
privacy.section1_content: When you visit the Site, we automatically collect certain information about your device, including information about your web browser, IP address, time zone, and some of the cookies installed on your device.
privacy.section2_title: 2. How do we use your personal information?
privacy.section2_content: We use the Order Information that we collect generally to fulfill any orders placed through the Site (including processing your payment information, arranging for shipping, and providing you with invoices and/or order confirmations).
privacy.section3_content: We share your Personal Information with third parties to help us use your Personal Information, as described above. For example, we use Shopify to power our online store.
privacy.contact_content: For more information about our privacy practices, if you have questions, or if you would like to make a complaint, please contact us by e-mail at areainfodream3d@gmail.com.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: This website is operated by Dream3D. Throughout the site, the terms "we", "us" and "our" refer to Dream3D.
terms.section1_content: By agreeing to these Terms of Service, you represent that you are at least the age of majority in your state or province of residence.
terms.section2_content: We reserve the right to refuse service to anyone for any reason at any time.
terms.section3_title: 3. Modifications to the Service and Prices
terms.section3_content: Prices for our products are subject to change without notice. We reserve the right at any time to modify or discontinue the Service (or any part or content thereof) without notice at any time.
terms.contact_content: Questions about the Terms of Service should be sent to us at areainfodream3d@gmail.com.
